rationale: Educ. Code §45.254 governs bond credit-enhancement eligibility criteria (issuance method and principal payment scheduling). It is wholly unrelated to homestead exemption amounts under Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote:
To be eligible for approval by the commissioner for credit enhancement under this subchapter:
(1) bonds must be issued in the manner provided by Section 45.054; and
(2) payments of all of the principal of the bonds must be scheduled during the first six months of the state fiscal year.
_note: No overlap between proposed change and this rule.
